creator: rhh@ct.picker.com
text:
If the part of the description of $TZ in environ(7) is still
        correct for 2.2 (that is, it's a path relative to
        /usr/share/zoneinfo), the example needs updated.  It
        cites TZ=US/Pacific as an example, but there is no such patch off
	/usr/share/zoneinfo.

Fix: 

Man page update.
How-To-Repeat: 
        2.2-ALPHA default dist.
